title: anthemis discoidea
intro: Anthemis discoidea, also known as sea chamomile or beach chamomile, is a small, shrubby perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and its medicinal properties include soothing skin irritations and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis discoidea include calming the mind, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of Anthemis discoidea include teas, infusions, and ointments that can be used to treat various health issues, making it a popular natural remedy in herbal medicine.
